CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, name Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_table3 (id Int32, score Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table1 VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, 'Charlie');
INSERT INTO test_table2 VALUES (1, 'David'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Eve');
INSERT INTO test_table3 VALUES (1, 85.5), (2, 92.0), (3, 76.5);
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION SELECT id, name FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION DISTINCT SELECT id, name FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM test_table3;
SELECT id, score FROM test_table3 UNION SELECT id, name FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, name, 'source1' AS source FROM test_table1 UNION SELECT id, name, 'source2' AS source FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM test_table2) AS combined;
SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table1) UNION SELECT id, score FROM test_table3;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 WHERE id < 3 UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM test_table2 WHERE id > 1;
SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table1) AS inner1 UNION SELECT id FROM test_table2) AS outer1;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION SELECT id, NULL AS name FROM test_table2 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION SELECT id, name FROM test_table2) AS combined ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_table4 AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, score AS name FROM test_table3;
SELECT id + 1 AS new_id, name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, name FROM test_table2) ORDER BY new_id;
